name: OpenAI o3-mini (Low)
note: Low reasoning-effort setting: fastest/cheapest of the three o3-mini configurations.

results.notes: AIME 2024, low effort, reproduces OpenAI system-card table

From the 'o3-mini-low' row of OpenAI's own simple-evals README results table (confirmed via direct raw-file fetch: MMLU 84.9, GPQA 67.6, MATH 95.8, HumanEval 94.5, MGSM 89.4, DROP 77.6, SimpleQA 13.0). Same source/convention already used for the sibling 'OpenAI o1' corpus entry. Not currently tracked for this model (GPQA is already tracked from a different source at 70.6, so that one is intentionally skipped per de-dup rule).

verificationNotes: Release date 2025-01-31 and 200K context confirmed via prompthub.us and independent search corroboration. AIME 60, GPQA 70.6, Codeforces 1831, SWE-bench 40.8 (low effort) all confirmed by direct fetch of the lesswrong.com article, matching exactly. Pricing $1.10/$4.40 confirmed via direct fetch of developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/o3-mini and prompthub.us (two independent confirmations). No changes made.
